titleStmt.title: SII 26.186: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 186. (A.R. No. 175 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ Vīrarājēndra: No date: c. 1207-52 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records an order of the king addressed to the servants of the deity Āḷuḍaiyār, granting the village of Pāppārpūṇḍi alias Vīrarājēndranallūr in Vaḍapariśāra-nāḍu, as a dēvadāna to the temple. It is stated that the village was made habitable then.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭaiyār tevarkaṉmikaḷukku nammolai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu vaṭapa
ricāranāṭṭiṟ pāppārpūṇṭiyāṉa virarājendranallūr kuṭiyeṟṟi devatāṉamākak kuṭuttamaiyil Ivvūṟkellai noyyaṟkaraikku vaṭakkum kaḷḷiṭṭaikku kiḻakkum ceṅkuḷanālikkut teṟkum Īṉkoṭṭuttāḻvukku meṟkum Innāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nilamum Ittāl vanta Iṟai
puravu ciṟṟāyam Elavai yukavai maṉṟupāṭu taṇṭakuṟṟam cantatiyillāpporuḷum cumai cuṅkam cārikai veṭṭi muṭṭāvā maṟṟumeppeṟpaṭṭatum devar śi paṇṭāramāvutākuvum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka nammolai kuṭuttom Ippaṭi cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭikkuṭuttom .
Digital edition of SII 26.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
